description: Get Bluetooth speaker after finishing message batch

cues.visual: Small round speaker with gray fabric mesh cover

element3.detected_activity_raw: User just finished reading the last message in batch

encoding_info.encoding_text: After you finish the first batch of messages, go to the living room and get the Bluetooth speaker from the sideboard, bottom shelf — the round one with the fabric cover. Set it up in the dining area for dinner music.

confirmation_question.question: What type of cover does the speaker have?

distractor_info.distractor_description: Round speaker with black rubber cover, same shelf
